instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `must-be-string` that evaluates an expression once and uses CHECK-TYPE to require the value to be a string, returning the value.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (GET-NAME)))
            (CHECK-TYPE #:G1 STRING)
            #:G1)
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (GET-NAME)))
            (CHECK-TYPE #:G112 STRING)
            #:G112)

--- stderr ---
